intended_use: EchoGo Core is intended to be used for quantification and reporting of results of cardiovascular function to support physician diagnosis. EchoGo Core is indicated for use in adult populations.
intended_use_full: EchoGo Core is intended to be used for quantification and reporting of results of cardiovascular function to support physician diagnosis. EchoGo Core is indicated for use in adult populations.
target_condition: cardiovascular function assessment; left ventricular dysfunction
ground_truth: Reference values generated using TomTec Arena TTA2 predicate device, measured by echocardiographers and cardiologists
other_metrics: Ejection Fraction RMSE: 5.02%, Global Longitudinal Strain RMSE: 2.89%, End-diastolic Volume RMSE: 8.0 ml, End-systolic Volume RMSE: 11.1 ml. Inter and intra-operator variability: 0% bias and 0% RMSE.
